findings.title: AutoGPTQ/AutoGPTQ
findings.description: An easy-to-use LLMs quantization package with user-friendly apis, based on GPTQ algorithm.

findings.title: intel/neural-compressor
findings.description: SOTA low-bit LLM quantization (INT8/FP8/MXFP8/INT4/MXFP4/NVFP4) & sparsity; leading model compression techniques on PyTorch, TensorFlow, and ONNX Runtime

findings.title: ModelCloud/GPTQModel
findings.description: LLM model quantization (compression) toolkit with hw acceleration support for Nvidia CUDA, AMD ROCm, Intel XPU and Intel/AMD/Apple CPU via HF, vLLM, and SGLang.

findings.title: taishan1994/LLM-Quantization
findings.description: 记录量化LLM中的总结。

findings.title: abhinand5/gptq_for_langchain
findings.description: A guide about how to use GPTQ models with langchain

findings.title: zhihu/TLLM_QMM
findings.description: TLLM_QMM strips the implementation of quantized kernels of Nvidia's TensorRT-LLM, removing NVInfer dependency and exposes ease of use Pytorch module. We modified the dequantation and weight preprocessing to align with popular quantization alogirthms such as AWQ and GPTQ, and combine them with new FP8 quantization.

findings.title: bayjarvis/llm
findings.description: Fine-tuning, DPO, RLHF, RLAIF on LLMs - Qwen3, Zephyr 7B GPTQ with 4-Bit Quantization, Mistral-7B-GPTQ

findings.title: SIC0RPS/GIA
findings.description: Run local or API connected models from OpenAI, Hugging Face, or OpenRouter. Use your own data, load .safetensors or GPTQ models, and extend capabilities with Python plugins. Full UI (Gradio) and CLI integration. No cloud lock in. No coding required.

findings.title: upunaprosk/quantized-lm-confidence
findings.description: Code for NAACL paper When Quantization Affects Confidence of Large Language Models?

findings.title: SSshuishui/quant_gptq_series
findings.description: GPTQ-based LLM quantization methods

findings.title: amajji/LLM-Quantization-Techniques-Absmax-Zeropoint-GPTQ-GGUF
findings.description: LLM quantization techniques: absmax, zero-point, GPTQ and GGUF

findings.title: IST-DASLab/GPTQ-Babai
findings.description: Official Repository for "The Geometry of LLM Quantization: GPTQ as Babai's Nearest Plane Algorithm" (ICLR 2026)

findings.title: ShipItAndPray/turboquant
findings.description: Compress Any LLM Up to 6x in One Command. Unified CLI for GGUF, GPTQ, and AWQ quantization.

findings.title: STiFLeR7/Edge-LLM
findings.description: Optimized Qwen2.5-3B using GPTQ, reducing size from 5.75GB → 1.93GB and improving inference speed. Ideal for efficient edge AI deployments.

findings.title: psunlpgroup/Compression-Effects
findings.description: [ICLR2026] When Reasoning Meets Compression: Understanding the Effects of LLMs Compression on Large Reasoning Models. Support interpretation of Qwen, Llama, etc.

findings.title: lpalbou/model-quantizer
findings.description: Effortlessly quantize, benchmark, and publish Hugging Face models with cross-platform support for CPU/GPU. Reduce model size by 75% while maintaining performance.

findings.title: SujanNeupane42/LLM_Quantization
findings.description: Quantizing LLMs using GPTQ

findings.title: lciric/gptq-from-scratch
findings.description: GPTQ post-training quantization from scratch — GPT-2, OPT, LLaMA support

findings.title: hao-hoang/LLM-Quantization-Zoo
findings.description: A collection of hands-on notebooks demonstrating various model quantization techniques, including GPTQ, GGUF, ExLlamaV2, and 8-bit quantization.

findings.title: cloud-zby/LLM-Acceleration
findings.description: Comprehensive Acceleration of Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct with GPTQ-Quantization, VLLM, KV-Cache Quantization, Speculative Decoding, and Flash Attention.
